project.title: Toxoplasma MYR1 Immunoprecipitations
project.projectDescription: IP-MS experiments to identify interacting proteins of Toxoplasma MYR1.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: TgMYR1-3xHA and co-precipitating proteins were isolated from infected cultures of human foreskin fibroblasts using anti-HA magnetic beads.

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: Department of Microbiology and Immunology, 299 Campus Drive, Stanford School of Medicine, Stanford CA 94305-5124
labPIs.name: John C. Boothroyd

experimentTypes.name: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

references.referenceLine: Cygan AM, Theisen TC, Mendoza AG, Marino ND, Panas MW, Boothroyd JC. Coimmunoprecipitation with MYR1 Identifies Three Additional Proteins within the Toxoplasma gondii Parasitophorous Vacuole Required for Translocation of Dense Granule Effectors into Host Cells. mSphere. 2020 5(1)
